mapper.select: select id, payment_no, order_no, user_id, amount, pay_channel, pay_status, transaction_no, callback_payload, fail_reason, paid_time, create_time, update_time from order_payment where order_no = #{orderNo} order by id desc limit 1

select id, payment_no, order_no, user_id, amount, pay_channel, pay_status, transaction_no, callback_payload, fail_reason, paid_time, create_time, update_time from order_payment where order_no = #{orderNo} order by id desc
mapper.update: update order_payment set pay_status = '1', pay_channel = #{payChannel}, transaction_no = #{transactionNo}, callback_payload = #{callbackPayload}, paid_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id} and pay_status = '0'
